nodes.label: AI as ideation and trend assistant
nodes.label_negative: AI as threat to authentic voice
nodes.grounding_span: Having an engine to keep up with algorithms, feature changes, and trends to point those details in the right direction is helpful

nodes.label: AI as supplement to creative process
nodes.label_negative: Human in driver's seat making creative decisions

nodes.label: AI with company-specific knowledge
nodes.label_negative: Personal research and staying in tune with industry standards
nodes.grounding_span: I am less in tune with industry standards, so to speak. Before AI, I dedicated more time to researching what was changing with social media

nodes.label: AI as supplement to creative process
nodes.label_negative: AI as substitute for human creativity
nodes.grounding_span: AI should be a supplement to the stages of the creative process, not a substitute

nodes.label: AI as tool versus crutch
nodes.label_negative: AI as crutch replacing skill development
nodes.grounding_span: I'm using AI as a true assistant and not crutch

nodes.label: AI representation of diverse identities
nodes.label_negative: AI bias in representation (colorism, texturism, featurism)
nodes.grounding_span: if I plug my photo into an image generator/manipulators, I can all but guarantee that my skin will be lightened, my hair texture will be loosened

nodes.label: Authentic personal expression
nodes.grounding_span: I still make sure the 'bones' are authentically me

nodes.label: Creative fulfillment and discovery

nodes.grounding_span: I'm making a conscious effort to continue my education

nodes.label: Cultural representation and equity
nodes.grounding_span: cultural competency remains important in the development of creative AI

nodes.label: Resistance to AI in creative work

nodes.label: Frustration with AI limitations

nodes.label: Concern about AI as crutch
nodes.grounding_span: I'm using AI as a true assistant and not crutch

nodes.label: Negative stance toward AI due to hidden biases and reproducibility concerns
nodes.grounding_span: it's dangerous for an AI engine to send the message that the ideal is anything and everything BUT what you are

nodes.label: Value-driven boundary setting — limits AI use to preserve personal authenticity

nodes.label: Intentional skill-building to maintain independence from AI
